title: The Transporter Refueled
desc: Frank Martin, a former mercenary, is hired by a woman and her accomplices to fulfil a contract. Soon, however, he must join forces with them to bring down a Russian crime lord.

title: Piranha 3DD
desc: The bloodthirsty piranhas head towards a local water park. Amidst the fun-seeking horde at the park are friends Maddy, Barry and Kyle who decide to take on the man-eating creatures.

title: Spider-Man 3
desc: A symbiote bonds with Peter Parker, intensifying his abilities and aggression. Now, he must face the challenges that his new powers bring while simultaneously fighting new villains.

title: 300: Rise of an Empire
desc: Xerxes, seeking revenge for his father's death, declares war on Greece. As a result, Themistocles, the Athenian admiral, is compelled to form an alliance with Sparta to protect Athens.

title: The LEGO Movie
desc: Emmet, an ordinary individual prophesied to be the Special, is entrusted with the responsibility of saving the Lego world from the cruel ways of Lord Business.

title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
desc: The Decepticons are trying to learn the secrets of a stranded Cybertronian spacecraft. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must stop them before it is too late.

title: Mission: Impossible -- Ghost Protocol
desc: Ethan Hunt, an expert agent, confronts a worldwide plot. To prevent a nuclear crisis, he collaborates secretly with his team after his organisation is deceived.

title: Mission: Impossible -- Ghost Protocol
desc: Ethan Hunt, an expert agent, confronts a worldwide plot. To prevent a nuclear crisis, he collaborates secretly with his team after his organisation is deceived.

title: Wedding Crashers
desc: Two philanderers get stuck in a situation when one of them falls for the bridesmaid at one of the weddings that they intrude.

title: The Kid
desc: After a woman abandons her child, the Tramp finds him and takes him under his wing. As the boy grows up, the Tramp and the boy try to cope with life's trials and tribulations.

title: Red Dawn
desc: A soldier and his brother escape into the woods when their city is invaded by North Korean paratroopers. After their father is killed, the brothers form a guerrilla group to fight back.

title: I Am Wrath
desc: After corrupt cops are unable to catch his wife's killers, Stanley, an unemployed man, teams up with an old friend to avenge her death.

title: Tom & Jerry
desc: Jerry, a mischievous mouse, takes refuge in a fancy hotel that is set to host a wedding. In order to get rid of him, one of the event planners hires Jerry's feline rival, Tom.

title: White House Down
desc: When terrorists suddenly invade the White House, police officer John Cale springs into action to protect his daughter and the President of the United States.

title: Now You See Me
desc: Four talented magicians are plucked from obscurity to become the Four Horsemen - a group of stage illusionists who soon attract the attention of the FBI.

title: Troy
desc: After Paris, a Trojan prince, has an affair with Menelaus's wife, Helen, he decides to take her with him. Later, Menelaus's brother uses that as an excuse to wage a war against the city of Troy.

title: Godzilla vs. Kong
desc: King Kong is transported out of his containment zone after Godzilla resurfaces and creates mayhem. Humans need his help to reach Hollow Earth and find a way to subdue the king of the monsters.

title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
desc: Peter Parker faces Electro and his old friend who is dying and looks out for Spider-Man's blood in order to cure himself.

title: Johnny English Strikes Again
desc: When a hacker reveals the identities of Britain's undercover agents, British agent Johnny English springs back into action and must overcome the challenges of modern technology.

title: The Nun II
desc: In 1956 France, Sister Irene faces the terrifying demon Valak, racing against time to save a convent and the surrounding community from evil.

title: Blue Beetle
desc: An ancient alien relic chooses a college graduate to be its symbiotic host. As a result, the young man finds himself in possession of a suit with incredible powers.
